text:
Updated xemacs-mule ports for ELFlization.

Update files are respecively :
[Update] :
editors/xemacs-mule, editors/xemacs-mule-common,
japanese/xemacs, japanese/xemacs-canna+wnn6, japanese/xemacs-wnn6

Updated ports have diff+gz+uuencode to "xemacs-mule-981009.diff.gz.uu"
and put below ">Fix".
